Export.Routine: DVPXRX ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform Pharmacy Wrapper Functions;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ; ;Per VA Directive 6402, this routine should not be modified. ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- ; DIQ 2056 ; ORWORR 3367 ; PSO52API 4820 ; PSOORRL 2400 ; VASITE 10112 ; XLFDT 10103 ; DVPUTL Q ; GETMEDS(SOURCE,TARGET) ; Get Patient Meds N DFN,DVPSITE,DVPSTN,DVPDATA N X F X="DFN","SDATE","EDATE" D INITPARM^DVPUTL(.X) S DVPSITE=$$SITE^VASITE,DVPSTN=$P(DVPSITE,U,3) I 'DFN D Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() . D BLDERROR^DVPUTL(1,"Patient DFN is undefined","GETMEDS^DVPXRX") ; Default to last 180 days I SDATE']"" S SDATE=$$FMADD^XLFDT(DT,-180) I EDATE']"" S EDATE=DT K ^TMP("PS",$J) D OCL^PSOORRL(DFN,SDATE,EDATE,"") N ITMP,FIELDS,INSTRUCT,COMMENTS,REASON,NVSDT,TYPE,ILST,J,DVPOCL S ILST=0 S DVPOCL=$NA(^TMP($J,"DVPOCL")) K @DVPOCL M @DVPOCL=^TMP("PS",$J) K ^TMP("PS",$J) S ITMP="" F S ITMP=$O(@DVPOCL@(ITMP)) Q:'ITMP D . K INSTRUCT,COMMENTS,REASON . K ^TMP("DVPACT",$J,"COMMENTS") . S COMMENTS="^TMP(""DVPACT"",$J,""COMMENTS"")" . S (INSTRUCT,@COMMENTS)="",FIELDS=@DVPOCL@(ITMP,0) . S TYPE=$S($P($P(FIELDS,U),";",2)="O":"OP",1:"UD") . I $D(@DVPOCL@(ITMP,"CLINIC",0)) S TYPE="CP" . N LOC,LOCEX S (LOC,LOCEX)="" . I TYPE="CP" S LOC=$G(@DVPOCL@(ITMP,"CLINIC",0)) . S:LOC LOCEX=$P($G(^SC(+LOC,0)),U)_":"_+LOC ;IMO NEW . I TYPE="OP",$P(FIELDS,";")["N" S TYPE="NV" . I TYPE="OP",$P(FIELDS,";")["P" S TYPE="OO" ; Pending Outpatient Order . I TYPE="UD",$P(FIELDS,";")["P" S TYPE="IO" ; Pending Inpatient Order . I $O(@DVPOCL@(ITMP,"A",0))>0 S TYPE="IV" . I $O(@DVPOCL@(ITMP,"B",0))>0 S TYPE="IV" . I (TYPE="UD")!(TYPE="CP") D UDINST(.INSTRUCT,ITMP,.DVPOCL,LOCEX) . I TYPE="OP" D OPINST(.INSTRUCT,ITMP,.DVPOCL,SDATE,EDATE,DFN) . I TYPE="IV" D IVINST(.INSTRUCT,ITMP,.DVPOCL) . I TYPE="NV" D NVINST(.INSTRUCT,ITMP,.DVPOCL) . I TYPE="OO" D POINST(.INSTRUCT,ITMP,.DVPOCL) . I TYPE="IO" D PIINST(.INSTRUCT,ITMP,.DVPOCL) K ^TMP("PS",$J),^TMP("DVPACT",$J),^TMP($J,"DVPOCL"),^TMP("PS",$J),^TMP($J,"RX52"),^TMP($J,"DRUG") I '$D(@TARGET@("results")) S @TARGET@("results")="0" Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() ; UDINST(Y,INDEX,DVPOCL,LOCEX) ; assembles instructions for a unit dose order N I,X,RST,UDIEN,UDUID S X=@DVPOCL@(INDEX,0) S UDIEN=+$P(X,U) S UDUID=$$SETUID^DVPXUTL(DVPSTN,DFN,UDIEN,"55UD") S @TARGET@("results","unitDose",UDUID,"uid")=UDUID S @TARGET@("results","unitDose",UDUID,"type")="I" I LOCEX]"" S @TARGET@("results","unitDose",UDUID,"location")=LOCEX D SETZERO^DVPXRX1(X,"unitDose",UDUID) D SETMULT^DVPXRX1(.DVPOCL,INDEX,"unitDose",UDUID) ; assembles start date and reasons for a Unit Dose med N IFNLST,UDLST,UDSDT I +$P(X,U,8) S IFNLST(1)=+$P(X,U,8) D GET4V11^ORWORR(.UDLST,2,0,.IFNLST) I $D(UDLST(1)) D . S UDSDT=$P(UDLST(1),U,3) . I +UDSDT S @TARGET@("results","unitDose",UDUID,"dateTimeOrdered")=UDSDT_U_$$FMTE^XLFDT(UDSDT) . I +$P(UDLST(1),U,4) S @TARGET@("results","unitDose",UDUID,"startTimeOrdered")=$P(UDLST(1),U,4)_U_$$FMTE^XLFDT($P(UDLST(1),U,4)) . I +$P(UDLST(1),U,5) S @TARGET@("results","unitDose",UDUID,"stopTimeOrdered")=$P(UDLST(1),U,5)_U_$$FMTE^XLFDT($P(UDLST(1),U,5)) . I UDLST(3)]"" S @TARGET@("results","unitDose",UDUID,"orderComments")=$E(UDLST(3),2,999) . I +$P(UDLST(1),U,10) D PROVIDER^DVPXRX1(+$P(UDLST(1),U,10),UDUID,"orderingProvider","unitDose") . S DRUG=$O(^PSDRUG("B",$P(X,U,2),0)) . I +DRUG D PSDRUG^DVPXRX1(DRUG,UDUID,"unitDose") Q ; OPINST(Y,INDEX,DVPOCL,SDATE,EDATE,DFN) ; assembles instructions for an outpatient prescription N I,X,RST,RXIEN,SIG,SPINST,ROUTE,SCHED,DRUG,RXDAT,FILE,FLDNAME,RXUID S X=@DVPOCL@(INDEX,0) S RXIEN=+$P(X,U) S RXUID=$$SETUID^DVPXUTL(DVPSTN,DFN,RXIEN,"52") D SETZERO^DVPXRX1(X,"outpatient",RXUID) S @TARGET@("results","outpatient",RXUID,"uid")=RXUID S @TARGET@("results","outpatient",RXUID,"type")="O" D SETMULT^DVPXRX1(.DVPOCL,INDEX,"outpatient",RXUID) D RX^PSO52API(DFN,"RX52",RXIEN,"","",SDATE,EDATE) S RXDAT=$NA(^TMP($J,"RX52")),FILE=52 S RXIEN=0 F S RXIEN=$O(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN)) Q:'RXIEN D . N FLD S FLD="" F S FLD=$O(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD)) Q:FLD="" D . . I $D(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD))=1 D Q . . . ; Get Drug specific fields . . . I FLD=6 D PSDRUG^DVPXRX1($P(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD),U),RXUID,"outpatient") . . . S FLDNAME=$$GETFLD^DVPUTL(FILE,FLD) . . . I FLDNAME]"#" S FLDNAME=$REPLACE(FLDNAME,"#",$S($E(FLDNAME,1)="#":"NUMBER ",1:" NUMBER ")) . . . S FLDNAME=$TR(FLDNAME,"-_/"," ") . . . S FLDNAME=$$CONVERT^DVPUTL(FLDNAME) . . . I FLDNAME]"",@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD)]"" S @TARGET@("results","outpatient",RXUID,FLDNAME)=$S($P(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD),U,2)]"":$P(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD),U,2),1:@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD)) . . . I FLD=9,$P(X,U,5)]"" S @TARGET@("results","outpatient",RXUID,"refillsRemaining")=$P(X,U,5) . . . ; Get Provider details . . . I FLDNAME["provider"!(FLDNAME["Provider"),@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD)]"" D . . . . N PRVSPC D PROVIDER^DVPXUTL(.PRVSPC,@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD),FLDNAME) . . . . I $D(PRVSPC)>1 M @TARGET@("results","outpatient",RXUID)=PRVSPC . . ; If we are here then this is a global node and not a field . . I $T(@FLD)]"" D @FLD Q ; IVINST(Y,INDEX,DVPOCL) ; assembles instructions for an IV order N SOLN1,I,RST,IVDUR,CNT,IVIEN,IVUID S IVDUR="" S X=@DVPOCL@(INDEX,0) S IVIEN=+$P(X,U) S IVUID=$$SETUID^DVPXUTL(DVPSTN,DFN,IVIEN,"55IV") S @TARGET@("results","iv",IVUID,"uid")=IVUID S @TARGET@("results","iv",IVUID,"type")="I" D SETZERO^DVPXRX1(X,"iv",IVUID) D SETMULT^DVPXRX1(.DVPOCL,INDEX,"iv",IVUID) S:$D(@DVPOCL@(INDEX,"IVLIM",0)) IVDUR=$G(@DVPOCL@(INDEX,"IVLIM",0)) I $L(IVDUR) D . N DURU,DURV S DURU="",DURV=0 . I IVDUR["dose" D Q . .S DURV=$P(IVDUR,"doses",2) . .S IVDUR="for a total of "_+DURV_$S(+DURV=1:"dose",+DURV>1:" doses",1:" dose") . .S @RST@(@RST)=@RST@(@RST)_" "_IVDUR . S DURU=$E(IVDUR,1),DURV=$E(IVDUR,2,$L(IVDUR)) . I (DURU="D")!(DURU="d") S IVDUR="for "_+DURV_$S(+DURV=1:" day",+DURV>1:" days",1:" day") . I (DURU="H")!(DURU="h") S IVDUR="for "_+DURV_$S(+DURV=1:" hours",+DURV>1:" hours",1:" hour") . I (DURU="M")!(DURU="m") S IVDUR="with total volume "_+DURV_" ml" . I (DURU="L")!(DURU="l") S IVDUR="with total volume "_+DURV_" L" . S @TARGET@("results","iv",IVUID,"duration")=IVDUR ; assembles start date and reasons for a IV med N IFNLST,IVLST,IVSDT I +$P(X,U,8) S IFNLST(1)=+$P(X,U,8) D GET4V11^ORWORR(.IVLST,2,0,.IFNLST) I $D(IVLST(1)) D . S IVSDT=$P(IVLST(1),U,3) . I +IVSDT S @TARGET@("results","iv",IVUID,"dateTimeOrdered")=IVSDT_U_$$FMTE^XLFDT(IVSDT) . I +$P(IVLST(1),U,4) S @TARGET@("results","iv",IVUID,"startTimeOrdered")=$P(IVLST(1),U,4)_U_$$FMTE^XLFDT($P(IVLST(1),U,4)) . I +$P(IVLST(1),U,5) S @TARGET@("results","iv",IVUID,"stopTimeOrdered")=$P(IVLST(1),U,5)_U_$$FMTE^XLFDT($P(IVLST(1),U,5)) . I IVLST(3)]"" S @TARGET@("results","iv",IVUID,"orderComments")=$E(IVLST(3),2,999) . I +$P(IVLST(1),U,10) D PROVIDER^DVPXRX1(+$P(IVLST(1),U,10),IVUID,"orderingProvider","iv") . S DRUG=$O(^PSDRUG("B",$P(X,U,2),0)) . I +DRUG D PSDRUG^DVPXRX1(DRUG,IVUID,"iv") Q ; NVINST(Y,INDEX,DVPOCL) ; assembles instructions for a non-VA med N I,X,RST,RXUID,NVAID,NVUID,DRUG S X=@DVPOCL@(INDEX,0) S NVAID=+$P(X,U) S NVUID=$$SETUID^DVPXUTL(DVPSTN,DFN,NVAID,"55NVA") S @TARGET@("results","nonVA",NVUID,"uid")=NVUID S @TARGET@("results","nonVA",NVUID,"type")="N" D SETZERO^DVPXRX1(X,"nonVA",NVUID) ; assembles start date and reasons for a non-VA med N IFNLST,NVALST I +$P(X,U,8) S IFNLST(1)=+$P(X,U,8) D GET4V11^ORWORR(.NVALST,2,0,.IFNLST) I $D(NVALST(1)) D . S NVSDT=$P(NVALST(1),U,3) . I +NVSDT S @TARGET@("results","nonVA",NVUID,"dateTimeOrdered")=NVSDT_U_$$FMTE^XLFDT(NVSDT) . I +$P(NVALST(1),U,4) S @TARGET@("results","nonVA",NVUID,"startTimeOrdered")=$P(NVALST(1),U,4)_U_$$FMTE^XLFDT($P(NVALST(1),U,4)) . I +$P(NVALST(1),U,5) S @TARGET@("results","nonVA",NVUID,"stopTimeOrdered")=$P(NVALST(1),U,5)_U_$$FMTE^XLFDT($P(NVALST(1),U,5)) . I NVALST(3)]"" S @TARGET@("results","nonVA",NVUID,"orderComments")=$E(NVALST(3),2,999) . I +$P(NVALST(1),U,10) D PROVIDER^DVPXRX1(+$P(NVALST(1),U,10),NVUID,"orderingProvider","nonVA") . D SETMULT^DVPXRX1(.DVPOCL,INDEX,"nonVA",NVUID) . S DRUG=$O(^PSDRUG("B",$P(X,U,2),0)) . I +DRUG D PSDRUG^DVPXRX1(DRUG,NVUID,"nonVA") Q ; POINST(Y,INDEX,DVPOCL) ; assembles instructions for a Pending Outpatient Order med N I,X,RST,RXUID,POID,POUID,DRUG S X=@DVPOCL@(INDEX,0) S POID=+$P(X,U) S POUID=$$SETUID^DVPXUTL(DVPSTN,DFN,POID,"52.41") S @TARGET@("results","pendingOutpatientOrder",POUID,"uid")=POUID S @TARGET@("results","pendingOutpatientOrder",POUID,"type")="O" D SETZERO^DVPXRX1(X,"pendingOutpatientOrder",POUID) ; assembles start date and reasons for a Pending Outpatient med N IFNLST,POLST,POSDT I +$P(X,U,8) S IFNLST(1)=+$P(X,U,8) D GET4V11^ORWORR(.POLST,2,0,.IFNLST) I $D(POLST(1)) D . S POSDT=$P(POLST(1),U,3) . I +POSDT S @TARGET@("results","pendingOutpatientOrder",POUID,"dateTimeOrdered")=POSDT_U_$$FMTE^XLFDT(POSDT) . I +$P(POLST(1),U,4) S @TARGET@("results","pendingOutpatientOrder",POUID,"startTimeOrdered")=$P(POLST(1),U,4)_U_$$FMTE^XLFDT($P(POLST(1),U,4)) . I +$P(POLST(1),U,5) S @TARGET@("results","pendingOutpatientOrder",POUID,"stopTimeOrdered")=$P(POLST(1),U,5)_U_$$FMTE^XLFDT($P(POLST(1),U,5)) . I POLST(3)]"" S @TARGET@("results","pendingOutpatientOrder",POUID,"orderComments")=$E(POLST(3),2,999) . I +$P(POLST(1),U,10) D PROVIDER^DVPXRX1(+$P(POLST(1),U,10),POUID,"orderingProvider","pendingOutpatientOrder") . D SETMULT^DVPXRX1(.DVPOCL,INDEX,"pendingOutpatientOrder",POUID) . S @TARGET@("results","pendingOutpatientOrder",POUID,"numberOfRefills")=$$GET1^DIQ(52.41,POID_",",13) . S @TARGET@("results","pendingOutpatientOrder",POUID,"enteredBy")=$$GET1^DIQ(52.41,POID_",",4) . S @TARGET@("results","pendingOutpatientOrder",POUID,"daysSupply")=$$GET1^DIQ(52.41,POID_",",101) . S @TARGET@("results","pendingOutpatientOrder",POUID,"loginDate")=$$GET1^DIQ(52.41,POID_",",15) . S @TARGET@("results","pendingOutpatientOrder",POUID,"mailWindow")=$$GET1^DIQ(52.41,POID_",",19) . S @TARGET@("results","pendingOutpatientOrder",POUID,"patient")=$$GET1^DIQ(52.41,POID_",",1) . S DRUG=$O(^PSDRUG("B",$P(X,U,2),0)) . I +DRUG D PSDRUG^DVPXRX1(DRUG,POUID,"pendingOutpatientOrder") Q ; PIINST(Y,INDEX,DVPOCL) ; assembles instructions for a Pending Inpatient Order med N I,X,RST,PIID,PIUID,DRUG S X=@DVPOCL@(INDEX,0) S PIID=+$P(X,U) S PIUID=$$SETUID^DVPXUTL(DVPSTN,DFN,PIID,"53.1") S @TARGET@("results","pendingInpatientOrder",PIUID,"uid")=PIUID S @TARGET@("results","pendingInpatientOrder",PIUID,"type")="I" D SETZERO^DVPXRX1(X,"pendingInpatientOrder",PIUID) ; assembles start date and reasons for a Pending Inpatient med N IFNLST,PILST,PISDT I +$P(X,U,8) S IFNLST(1)=+$P(X,U,8) D GET4V11^ORWORR(.PILST,2,0,.IFNLST) I $D(PILST(1)) D . S PISDT=$P(PILST(1),U,3) . S @TARGET@("results","pendingInpatientOrder",PIUID,"dateTimeOrdered")=PISDT_U_$$FMTE^XLFDT(PISDT) . I +$P(PILST(1),U,4) S @TARGET@("results","pendingInpatientOrder",PIUID,"startTimeOrdered")=$P(PILST(1),U,4)_U_$$FMTE^XLFDT($P(PILST(1),U,4)) . I +$P(PILST(1),U,5) S @TARGET@("results","pendingInpatientOrder",PIUID,"stopTimeOrdered")=$P(PILST(1),U,5)_U_$$FMTE^XLFDT($P(PILST(1),U,5)) . I PILST(3)]"" S @TARGET@("results","pendingInpatientOrder",PIUID,"orderComments")=$E(PILST(3),2,999) . I +$P(PILST(1),U,10) D PROVIDER^DVPXRX1(+$P(PILST(1),U,10),PIUID,"provider","pendingInpatientOrder") . D SETMULT^DVPXRX1(.DVPOCL,INDEX,"pendingInpatientOrder",PIUID) . S DRUG=$O(^PSDRUG("B",$P(X,U,2),0)) . I +DRUG D PSDRUG^DVPXRX1(DRUG,PIUID,"pendingInpatientOrder") Q ; RF ; Refills I $D(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,0)),+$P(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,0),U)>0 D . D RXSLOOP^DVPXRX1(52.1,RXIEN,"refills","outpatient") Q ; IB ; Integrated Billing info I $D(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,0)),+$P(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,0),U)>0 D . D RXSLOOP^DVPXRX1(52.1,RXIEN,"integratedBilling","outpatient") Q ; P ; Partial Refills I $D(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,0)),+$P(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,0),U)>0 D . D RXSLOOP^DVPXRX1(52.2,RXIEN,"partialFills","outpatient") Q ; OI ; Orderable Items I $D(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD)),+$P(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,0),U)>0 S @TARGET@("results","outpatient",RXUID,"orderableItem")=@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD) Q ; L ; Label multiple I $D(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,0)),+$P(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,0),U)>0 D . D RXSLOOP^DVPXRX1(52.032,RXIEN,"label","outpatient") Q ; S ; SAND node I $D(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,0)),+$P(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,0),U)>0 D . D RXSLOOP^DVPXRX1(52,RXIEN,"sand","outpatient") Q ; M ; Medication SIG I $D(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,0)),+$P(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,0),U)>0 D . S X=0 F S X=$O(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,X)) Q:'X D . . I @RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,X,0)]"" S @TARGET@("results","outpatient",RXUID,"sig",X)=@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,X,0) Q ; C ; CMOP Data I $D(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,0)),+$P(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,0),U)>0 D . D RXSLOOP^DVPXRX1(52.01,RXIEN,"cmop","outpatient") Q
